## Downloads

| Platform | File |
|----------|------|
| **macOS (any Mac)** | `elastic-bangalore_*_darwin_universal.tar.gz` |
| macOS Apple Silicon | `elastic-bangalore_*_darwin_arm64.tar.gz` |
| macOS Intel | `elastic-bangalore_*_darwin_amd64.tar.gz` |
| Linux x86_64 | `elastic-bangalore_*_linux_amd64.tar.gz` |
| Linux ARM64 | `elastic-bangalore_*_linux_arm64.tar.gz` |
| Windows x86_64 | `elastic-bangalore_*_windows_amd64.zip` |
| Windows ARM64 | `elastic-bangalore_*_windows_arm64.zip` |

See `INSTALL.txt` inside each archive for step-by-step instructions.
